_comment: A2 wave 1 (2026-05-29, autopilot): Groq-70B generation + 5 parallel norwegian-linguist reviews of 10 previously-never-generated A2 concepts. 210 candidates -> 118 KEEP seeded (~56%). Terminal periods normalized; 'igår'->'i går' fixed. word-formation/numerals-advanced/imperative got 0 (Groq TPM exhaustion at run tail) -> regenerate in wave 2.
linguist_caught: B1 counterfactual conditionals (Om jeg hadde penger, kjøpte jeg...), Danisms (ven/cykel/mere), tør-å vs tør modal error, V2 violation after fronted kanskje, malformed genitives (Jensas/Farenas/Kvinneens), starte-å calque, off-concept nominal infinitives, jo-particle translation mismatches
